ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.
M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: I feel at risk of HIV infection in the next 3 months
Notes: 0= Strongly disagree; 1= Disagree; 2= Agree; 3= Strongly agree

ElementDescription: Imagining myself having HIV in the next 3 months is something I find easy to do
Notes: 0= Strongly disagree; 1= Disagree; 2= Agree; 3= Strongly agree

ElementDescription: I am concerned that I might have sex with someone who could give me HIV in the next 3 months
Notes: 0= Strongly disagree; 1= Disagree; 2= Agree; 3= Strongly agree

ElementDescription: I am much more likely to get HIV than my friends in the next 3 months
Notes: 0= Strongly disagree; 1= Disagree; 2= Agree; 3= Strongly agree

ElementDescription: My sexual behavior gives me a chance of getting HIV in the next 3 months
Notes: 0= Strongly disagree; 1= Disagree; 2= Agree; 3= Strongly agree

ElementDescription: I feel able to protect myself from getting HIV
Notes: 0= Strongly disagree; 1= Disagree; 2= Agree; 3= Strongly agree

ElementDescription: I think about my chances of getting HIV whenever I have a new sexual partner
Notes: 0= Strongly disagree; 1= Disagree; 2= Agree; 3= Strongly agree

ElementDescription: My main sexual partner's behavior gives me a chance of getting HIV in the next 3 months
Notes: 0= Strongly disagree; 1= Disagree; 2= Agree; 3= Strongly agree

ElementDescription: I trust my main sexual partner to keep me free from HIV
Notes: 0= Strongly disagree; 1= Disagree; 2= Agree; 3= Strongly agree
